name: Aiken County Corn Bread Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a batter with the cornmeal, flour, salt, baking powder, shortening (the oil from the poultry is typically used), and milk.
2. Bake in a hot oven (400°F) until done, about 30 minutes.
3. Crumble the bread, add chopped onion, pepper to taste, and additional salt if desired.
4. Add the two eggs and mix with the juice from the poultry or turkey.
5. Mix in finely chopped liver for added flavor.
6. Place dressing on one side of the baking dish and roast with the fowl until brown.
7. Baste the fowl during cooking to keep the dressing moist and enhance the flavor.
This recipe serves 12 persons.
